column3: Description
Stores registered user information for customers providers and administrators including role-specific profile fields and account status.
Stores email and password hash credentials for Node.js JWT authentication.
Stores OTP and reset tokens for forgot-password and password reset flows.
Stores uploaded verification documents such as ID card driver license and vehicle registration for provider approval.
Contains transport booking records including pickup and delivery addresses pricing status and linked customer and provider.
Tracks status change history and timestamps for each transport order.
Stores provider price quotes submitted for quotation-based move bookings.
Records provider accept decline or skip responses to incoming order requests.
Logs tracking milestones and status events during active order execution.
Records payment transactions for order deposits listing fees and other platform charges via PayOS.
Stores detailed payment transaction logs and gateway response metadata.
Tracks refund requests approvals and refund amounts linked to orders and payments.
Stores customer saved payment methods such as card Momo and PayOS-linked options.
Stores customer wallet balance used for listing fees and in-app payments.
Records wallet credit and debit transactions including marketplace listing fee deductions.
Tracks provider revenue earned from completed orders and platform commission.
Records provider withdrawal requests and admin approval status for payout.
Defines promotion codes discount rules validity period and usage limits.
Tracks which customers have applied specific promotion codes to orders.
Represents chat threads between customer and provider for an active transport order.
Stores individual chat messages sent within order conversations.
Stores in-app notifications for order updates marketplace events and system announcements.
Stores device push notification tokens for FCM delivery to mobile clients.
Stores user preferences for receiving different notification types.
Stores admin-created system announcements and broadcast messages.
Stores customer ratings and written reviews for providers after completed orders.
Maintains aggregated rating statistics and review counts per provider.
Records order disputes raised by customers including evidence and resolution status.
Stores messages and communication history within a dispute case.
Stores Pass đồ peer-to-peer used-item listings posted by student sellers.
Records buyers who expressed interest in a marketplace listing.
Represents chat threads between buyer and seller for a specific listing.
Stores negotiation messages exchanged in Pass đồ marketplace conversations.
Stores buyer ratings for sellers after completed marketplace transactions.
Defines transport service packages offered by providers or platform combo packages.
Stores provider weekly availability schedule slots for accepting orders.
Stores real-time GPS location of providers during active order tracking.
Archives historical location points for provider movement during transport.
Stores system-wide configuration parameters such as fees hints and operational rules.
Groups compatible move orders for potential shared-move cost optimization.
Tracks referral relationships and rewards between users who invite new customers.
